response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified Otonose Kanade from the birthday hashtag and visual cues. 2. Identified Song 1 as 'Luna say maybe' from on-screen text. Song 2 identified as 'You & 合図' from on-screen text. 3. Used web search to confirm composers: 'Luna say maybe' (Minami) and 'You & 合図' (TAK). 4. Searched for lyrics for 'Luna say maybe'. 5. Transcribed lyrics for 'You & 合図' as official lyrics were not found online. 6. Structured the response into three scenes: Song 1, transition, and Song 2.
response.global_summary: A video of a birthday concert featuring two vocal performances by VTuber Otonose Kanade. The first song is 'Luna say maybe' (originally by Minami) and the second is her original song 'You & 合図' (composed by TAK).

scenes.description: Otonose Kanade performs 'Luna say maybe'. The performer sings on stage with dramatic blue lighting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: あのね。I say “私、大丈夫？”Maybe, うまくやれるはずずっと走った息継ぎもしないままあっそう、終わりが来るなら別に寂しくなんかはない真実は心の奥の方自分のことすら愛せないまま君のこと守れるのかな“信じて”どうか、正真正銘のこの思いを聴いて 私、全身全霊で歌うから大丈夫、世界はこんなに綺麗だと、分かってる、分かってる、解ってる…わかってるよ！ごめんね。じれったい足りない、こんなんじゃ誰も愛せないの止めない、止まることは知らないの言葉足らず、失くしてしまう物ばかりだLuna say maybe…降るのは、迷be, rainy愛せ、どんな自分でもNavy色に染まるまで時間はかかるかもしれないけどI know, 輝くしかないことハイライト、塗り続けるしかない真実はちゃんと、言わなくちゃね目に見えるものが続くと、ずっとそう、ずっと思いたい君に、半信半疑な素振りして心、空回り、遠回り最低だ、もう一回やり直せるのなら素直になりたい、なりたい、なりたいと願ったジレンマこのまま、1人じゃ何もできない全部、決めるのは、自分次第初めて背中をみた時に、覚悟を決めた。どこまでいけるのか届くのかわからないよ臆病がそこに立っている3秒前バックステージ震える背中を君に預けてこの運命的出会いはきっと、そう、きっと偶然みたいな多分、神様のいたずらです。どうか、正心正銘のこの思いが君の心(ところ)にちゃんと届くまでここで、私、全心全霊で歌うから待ってる、待っているだから、この場所を大切にしたいの！これが、正真正銘の私だ！大丈夫、もう怖くはないわたまにつまづくことなら、あるけれど1番特特席で君の笑顔見たいんだ私だけの特権見えない未来、手探り今日もステージの上で証明して見せるからここにしかないスクリーンreally！ re@lly！君にまだ話せてないことばっかりあるんだ聴いて欲しいのあのね、
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: (English translation: Hey. I say 'Am I okay?' Maybe, I should be able to do it well. I kept running without even catching my breath. Ah, if it's going to end, I'm not lonely. The truth is deep in my heart. I can't even love myself, can I protect you? 'Believe me', please listen to this true thought. I'll sing it with all my soul because I know, I know, I understand... I understand! I'm sorry. It's frustrating. It's not enough, I can't love anyone like this. I won't stop, I don't know how to stop. It's just words, I keep losing things. Luna say maybe... It's falling, maybe, rainy. Love, even if I'm Navy until I'm dyed, it might take time, but I know, I have no choice but to shine. Highlight, I have no choice but to keep painting. I have to tell the truth. I want to think that if things I can see continue, they will always continue. I have a half-hearted attitude towards you. My heart is spinning, taking a detour. It's the worst, if I can do it over again, I want to be honest, I want to be honest, I wished. Dilemma, I can't do anything alone. It's all up to me. When I saw your back for the first time, I made up my mind. I don't know how far I can go, if I can reach you. Cowardice is standing there. 3 seconds before the backstage, I entrust my trembling back to you. This fateful meeting is surely, yes, surely just a coincidence, maybe, a prank of God. Until this true thought reaches you properly, I'll sing it with all my heart and soul. I'm waiting, I'm waiting, so I want to cherish this place! This is the real me! It's okay, I'm not afraid anymore. Sometimes I stumble, but I want to see your smile from the best seat. My own privilege. The unseen future, groping. Today, too, on the stage, I will prove it. Screen that only exists here, really! re@lly! There are many things I haven't told you yet. I want you to listen. Hey.),original_language:

scenes.description: Transition period between songs. Otonose Kanade takes a breath.
Otonose Kanade performs her original song 'You & 合図'. The performer sings and dances with backup dancers on a stage with vibrant lighting.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めの合図
スマホが踊る
そして半分眠った瞳で
心の震えは A=440Hz
今日のリズムは合言葉で合わせよう
ドゥルドゥル ドゥルドゥルドゥル
一歩前に レガート深呼吸
会う前には二度の瞬き
月曜の約束を奏でよう
ねえ、君と僕の合図
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Signal of awakening
Smartphone dances
And with half-asleep eyes
The trembling of the heart is A=440Hz
Let's match today's rhythm with a password
Dul-dul, dul-dul-dul
A step forward, legato deep breath
Blinking twice before meeting
Let's play the Monday promise
Hey, the signal between you and me
